title: Basic JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events. Focus on implementing keydown, keypress, keyup correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events
description: Create a function that uses keydown, keypress, keyup and event.key vs event.code together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events Project
description: Build a small application that applies keydown, keypress, keyup, event.key vs event.code, Mouse events (click, dblclick, mousedown, mouseup) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events
description: The following code has bugs related to keydown, keypress, keyup. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Keyboard and Mouse Events
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with keydown, keypress, keyup and event.key vs event.code.
